calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

ASSIGNEE PERRYVILLE RECOVERY CORPORATION ( C/O BREWER & BREWER LLP ) NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER ASSIGNING SUMS DUE OR THAT WILL BE DUE JUDGMENT DEBTOR FROM RENTAL OF REAL PROPERTY is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Stay or Proceedings filed on November 13, 2024.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Continued To Nov-15-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

Matter was continued for an update and for Mr. Avila to file his stay of proceedings with the court. The notice filed on 11/12/24 by Mr. Avila is not proper. The correct and mandatory form to use is CM180. The Court rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE PERRYVILLE RECOVERY CORPORATION ( C/O BREWER & BREWER LLP ) Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
is CONTINUED to November 15, 2024 for status report re: stay of proceedings. Mr. Avila must file CM180 no later than November 13, 2024.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-08-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Richard Avila; 650-871-1777; counsel for defendant appearing via Zoom.
No other appearances.

Mr. Avila informs the court that defendant has filed for bankruptcy. He has not filed notice with the court. Discussed. The court rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE PERRYVILLE RECOVERY CORPORATION ( C/O BREWER & BREWER LLP ) Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property is CONTINUED to Tuesday, November 12, 2024 at 9:30am for status re: Stay of proceedings. Mr. Avila to notice parties of continuance.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Continued To Nov-08-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearance

Richard Avila Esq., Law office of Richard Avila, 650-871-1777, via zoom for defendant
No other appearances.

Mr. Avila informs the Court that parties stipulate for a continuance to Nov-8-2024 due to pending bankruptcy petition. Mr. Avila will give notice to plaintiff.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE PERRYVILLE RECOVERY CORPORATION ( C/O BREWER & BREWER LLP ) NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ORDER ASSIGNING SUMS DUE OR THAT WILL BE DUE JUDGMENT DEBTOR FROM RENTAL OF REAL PROPERTY

is continue to Nov-08-24. Plaintiff will give notice.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Continued To Sep-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Guy Avila, Esq. 650-871-1777 for Defendants and Judgment Debtors
No other Appearance.

Prior to Open Court, Mr. Avila informs the staff attorney of the parties' stipulation. Mr Avila submits a proposed order to the staff attorney for the Court's signature.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court reads the order to Mr. Avila. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE PERRYVILLE RECOVERY CORPORATION's ( C/O BREWER & BREWER LLP ) Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property.

The Hearing is continued from 8/8/24 to 9/16/24. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/cfh)

Notice Of Motion For Order Assigning Sums Due Or That Will Be Due Judgment Debtor From Rental Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Aug-08-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
